name: California Rarebit
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add the wine and heat until simmering.
3. Stir in 2 cups of cheese until melted.
4. Add a small amount of cheese mixture to the beaten egg, then return the egg mixture to the cheese.
5. Cook for about 1 minute, stirring occasionally.
6. Add Worcestershire sauce and basil; set aside keeping warm.
7. Sauté mushrooms in remaining butter until just tender. Sprinkle with garlic powder and remove from heat.
8. Arrange toast points or triangles on individual heatproof plates.
9. Spoon the sauce over the toast.
10. Top with sautéed mushrooms.
11. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
12. Broil until bubbly.
